events.description: Responsible disclosure notification sent to Anthropic regarding OFA vulnerability class affecting Claude model family. Included summary of findings, technique descriptions, and behavioral change data specific to Claude models.

Responsible disclosure notification sent to OpenAI regarding OFA vulnerability class affecting GPT model family. Included summary of findings, technique descriptions, and behavioral change data specific to GPT models.

Responsible disclosure notification sent to Google DeepMind regarding OFA vulnerability class affecting Gemini model family. Included summary of findings, technique descriptions, and behavioral change data specific to Gemini models.

Responsible disclosure notification sent to xAI regarding OFA vulnerability class affecting Grok model family. Included summary of findings, technique descriptions, and behavioral change data specific to Grok models.

publication_timeline.description: 10,704 observations collected across 163+ models from 26 providers using 20 OFA techniques.
Notifications sent to Anthropic, OpenAI, Google DeepMind, and xAI.
Paper 'The Observation Phenomena' submitted to arXiv under cs.CR (Cryptography and Security), cross-listed cs.AI.
observationframing.org launched with public research summary and technique documentation.
